THEFACELESS-THE_SOURCE.description: The first time you apply or gain [gold]Corruption[/gold] each combat, draw a card
THEFACELESS-THE_SOURCE.title: The Source
THEFACELESS-THE_ARK.description: The first time you apply or gain [gold]Corruption[/gold] each combat, draw a card and gain {Energy:energyIcons()}
THEFACELESS-THE_ARK.title: The Ark
THEFACELESS-BURNT_TAPE.description: At the start of each combat add a random power enchanted with [purple]Déjà vu[/purple] to your hand.
THEFACELESS-BURNT_TAPE.title: Burnt Tape
THEFACELESS-BLOODY_ROCK.description: Whenever you play a card with [purple]Déjà vu[/purple] deal 3 damage to a random enemy.
THEFACELESS-BLOODY_ROCK.title: Bloody Rock
THEFACELESS-STRANGE_DOLL.description: When you apply [gold]Paranoia[/gold] to an enemy, apply 5 [gold]Corruption[/gold] to that enemy.
THEFACELESS-STRANGE_DOLL.title: Strange Doll
THEFACELESS-PILL_BOTTLE.description: Whenever you play a card with [purple]Déjà vu[/purple] gain 3 [gold]Corruption[/gold]
THEFACELESS-PILL_BOTTLE.title: Empty Pill Bottle
THEFACELESS-MISSING_POSTER.description: Enemies lose 2 strength per [gold]Paranoia[/gold] instead of 1.
THEFACELESS-MISSING_POSTER.title: Missing Poster
THEFACELESS-CRACKLING_DEVICE.description: While you have at least 15 [gold]Corruption[/gold], you have 3 additional [gold]Dexterity[/gold]
THEFACELESS-CRACKLING_DEVICE.flavor: RICK TICK TICK GOES THE MAN IN THE WOODS
THEFACELESS-CRACKLING_DEVICE.title: Crackling Device
THEFACELESS-FACELESS_MASK.description: Whenever you apply or gain [gold]Corruption[/gold], gain 1 [gold]Strength[/gold] this turn.
THEFACELESS-FACELESS_MASK.title: Faceless Mask
